title: Dungeon And Village: Bewitchment
description: This modification adds a village in the style of Bewitchment
body:
This modification adds a vanilla-style village for the Bewitchment modification.

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f384b1b91e2bc4d67b917b0e560115efe8282b8a.png)
__________________________________________________________________________________________
**Progress:**

🏰 Village: 1

⚔️ Dungeon: 1 
__________________________________________________________________________________________

Integration:

Vanilla Biome

Terralith

Biomes O' Plenty
